response: Japan, with a population of 125 million, has a GDP of $4.2 trillion and experienced a GDP growth rate of 1.1% last year. The country maintains a low unemployment rate of 2.6% and an inflation rate of 3.2%, though its debt-to-GDP ratio stands at a high 263%. Additionally, Japan boasts a life expectancy of 84.6 years and recorded $756 billion in exports.
